overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, starting from an outdoor cafe seating area with purple neon chairs and proceeding along rain-soaked streets lined with towering holographic advertisements and neon-lit skyscrapers. The footage showcases the vibrant, reflective wet pavement and dense urban architecture characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor cafe seating under covered walkway

events.description: exiting the covered cafe seating area onto the open sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking past purple neon-lit cafe chairs and tables under a covered walkway, moving toward the open street

entered.detail: futuristic outdoor seating with purple neon illumination and circular glass tables
overhead metal and glass awning structure sheltering the walkway
tall building with illuminated glass windows and neon accents in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered outdoor seating area with distinctive purple neon-lit chairs and tables. The camera moves forward along the sheltered walkway, with wet pavement reflecting the ambient neon lighting from surrounding buildings, before transitioning to the open sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk with towering holographic advertisements

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the massive holographic billboards on towering skyscrapers
futuristic vehicles pass by on the multi-lane street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk while looking up at the massive holographic advertisements covering the skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: tall palm tree with textured trunk lining the sidewalk edge
massive floating holographic advertisement display suspended between tall buildings
building exterior covered in bright neon signage and illuminated architectural lighting

segments.scene_description: Moving along the open sidewalk, the scene reveals towering skyscrapers covered in massive holographic advertisements and neon lighting. The camera pans upward to take in the scale of the cyberpunk architecture while futuristic vehicles pass on the adjacent multi-lane street.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial street with neon storefronts

events.description: waiting at the curb for vehicles to pass before crossing the street

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past commercial buildings with bright neon signage and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: standing at the crosswalk waiting to cross the street

entered.detail: multi-story commercial building with bright neon storefront lighting and large windows
futuristic traffic signal pole with illuminated pedestrian crossing signals
ground-level shop entrance with glowing cyan and purple digital displays

segments.scene_description: The walk continues along a busy commercial street lined with neon-lit storefronts and moderate pedestrian traffic. The camera approaches an intersection, waiting for futuristic vehicles to pass before crossing, with traffic lights and street infrastructure visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with metro station and holographic towers

events.description: stepping onto the crosswalk and entering the wide intersection
panning camera to view the surrounding cyberpunk architecture and towering holographic displays

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while observing the surrounding towering buildings and metro station entrance

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the intersection together toward the metro station

entered.detail: futuristic metro station entrance with large glowing cyan cross symbol and glass canopy
broad pedestrian crossing with yellow grid pattern markings on wet asphalt
elevated roadway structure with neon underlighting spanning above the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection with a prominent metro station entrance featuring a glowing cyan cross symbol. The camera pans to take in the panoramic view of towering cyberpunk buildings covered in holographic advertisements while crossing the street with other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with crosswalk and neon storefronts

events.description: crossing the final street section to reach the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: completing the street crossing and continuing along the opposite sidewalk past commercial establishments

entered.detail: modern building with transparent glass facade showing multiple interior levels and lighting
bright neon signs and digital advertisements at street level for various commercial establishments
short black and yellow striped posts lining the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera crossing the remaining street section with yellow and white crosswalk markings, passing by a modern glass commercial building and continuing along the sidewalk lined with neon storefront signs and traffic bollards.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered neon cafe into the expansive, rain-soaked heart of a towering cyberpunk metropolis. It begins within a covered seating area among purple neon-lit chairs, moving forward along a sheltered walkway where the wet pavement reflects the ambient glow before transitioning onto an open sidewalk. As the camera pans upward to reveal the immense scale of skyscrapers draped in massive holographic advertisements, the path leads further along a busy commercial street lined with glowing storefronts and passing futuristic vehicles. The scene then opens into a wide intersection, passing a metro station entrance marked by a glowing cyan cross while the camera takes in a panoramic view of the surrounding urban architecture. Finally, the movement carries across yellow and white crosswalk markings past a modern glass building, continuing along a sidewalk defined by neon signs and traffic bollards.
